name: ward
description: Policy-enforced safe execution for Somnia agents

scripts.test: LOG=$(mktemp); pnpm -r --if-present run test >"$LOG" 2>&1; RC=$?; cat "$LOG"; if [ "$RC" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'No test files found' "$LOG"; then echo 'Note: test files are not shipped in this public repo. See README test surface section for what is covered.'; rm -f "$LOG"; exit 0; fi; rm -f "$LOG"; exit "$RC"
scripts.quickstart: pnpm -C sdk run build && pnpm -C cli run build && pnpm -C dashboard run build && pnpm -C dashboard run preview
